name: clinicaltrialsgov-mcp-server
description: MCP server for the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API. Search trials, retrieve study details and results, and match patients to eligible trials.

CT_API_BASE_URL.title: ClinicalTrials.gov API base URL
CT_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL for the ClinicalTrials.gov v2 API.

CT_MAX_PAGE_SIZE.title: Maximum page size
CT_MAX_PAGE_SIZE.description: Maximum page size cap for API responses.

MCP_LOG_LEVEL.title: Log level
MCP_LOG_LEVEL.description: Minimum log level for output (debug, info, warn, error).
